song.title: I Belong to Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I belong to Jesus; I am not my own; All I have and all I am Shall be His alone.
[V2] 2) I belong to Jesus; He is Lord and King, Reigning in my inmost heart Over everything.
[V3] 3) I belong to Jesus; What can hurt or harm, When He folds around my soul His almighty arm?
[V4] 4) I belong to Jesus; Blessed, blessed thought! With His own most precious blood Has my soul been bought.
[V5] 5) I belong to Jesus; He has died for me; I am His and He is mine Through eternity.
[V6] 6) I belong to Jesus; He will keep my soul, If the deathly waters dark Round about me roll.
[V7] 7) I belong to Jesus; And ere long I’ll be With my precious Savior there In His royalty.
song.author: M. Fraser
